SEARCH
程序包 system.ui

类 WrapLayout

java.lang.Object
java.awt.FlowLayout
system.ui.WrapLayout
所有已实现的接口:
LayoutManager, Serializable
public class WrapLayout extends FlowLayout
A flow layout that wraps components to the next line when they exceed the container width.

This layout manager extends FlowLayout to support automatic line wrapping, making it ideal for displaying tags, buttons, or other components that should flow and wrap naturally.

从以下版本开始:
2025
另请参阅:
  • 序列化表格

  • 字段概要

    从类继承的字段 java.awt.FlowLayout

    CENTER, LEADING, LEFT, RIGHT, TRAILING

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    WrapLayout()
    Constructs a new WrapLayout with left alignment.
    WrapLayout(int align)
    Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment.
    WrapLayout(int align, int hgap, int vgap)
    Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment and gaps.

    Returns the preferred dimensions for this layout.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • WrapLayout

      public WrapLayout()
      Constructs a new WrapLayout with left alignment.

    • WrapLayout

      public WrapLayout(int align)
      Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment.
      参数:
      align - the alignment (LEFT, CENTER, RIGHT)

    • WrapLayout

      public WrapLayout(int align, int hgap, int vgap)
      Constructs a new WrapLayout with the specified alignment and gaps.
      参数:
      align - the alignment (LEFT, CENTER, RIGHT)
      hgap - the horizontal gap between components
      vgap - the vertical gap between rows

  • 方法详细资料

    • preferredLayoutSize

      public Dimension preferredLayoutSize(Container target)
      Returns the preferred dimensions for this layout.
      指定者:
      preferredLayoutSize 在接口中 LayoutManager
      覆盖:
      preferredLayoutSize 在类中 FlowLayout
      参数:
      target - the target container
      返回:
      the preferred dimensions

    • minimumLayoutSize

      public Dimension minimumLayoutSize(Container target)
      Returns the minimum dimensions for this layout.
      指定者:
      minimumLayoutSize 在接口中 LayoutManager
      覆盖:
      minimumLayoutSize 在类中 FlowLayout
      参数:
      target - the target container
      返回:
      the minimum dimensions
